---
title: "About"
page-layout: full
---

<div style="text-align: center;">

<img src="https://media.licdn.com/dms/image/v2/C4D03AQHg6NYHz-YDPA/profile-displayphoto-shrink_400_400/profile-displayphoto-shrink_400_400/0/1610337915831?e=1776902400&v=beta&t=UaOCXjbgoQIT0fBATRg8rgJ62IFSj-RBI0aJYkuqRUY"
     width="180"
     style="border-radius: 50%; margin-bottom: 20px;" />

## Hi, I’m Jacky

</div>

I work at the intersection of data, strategy, and execution. My background is in automotive marketplaces, where I partner with enterprise dealer groups to drive performance through pricing strategy, inventory optimization, and digital merchandising.

In my current role, I manage national-level accounts and focus on translating data into action — whether that’s improving lead efficiency, increasing visibility, or identifying opportunities within competitive markets.

---

## What I Do

- Analyze inventory and pricing dynamics across markets  
- Translate performance data into clear, actionable insights  
- Partner with dealer groups and leadership teams on growth strategy  
- Identify opportunities to improve lead generation and conversion  

---

## How I Think

I approach problems with a simple framework:

- Start with the data  
- Find the story  
- Focus on action  

The goal is always to make insights practical and usable.

---

## Outside of Work

I’m currently finishing a Master’s in Applied Business Analytics at Boston University, focused on data modeling, large-scale analysis, and visualization.

Outside of that, I enjoy optimizing systems — whether that’s travel rewards, workflows, or anything that can be made more efficient.
